versions.localizedDescription:
- Smoother scrolling
- Drawer open gesture refactor
- Pin to top when sending new messages

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cogwheel0/conduit/compare/v2.5.3...v2.5.4

- Fix paste to image on iOS
- Fix HEIC uploads and unsupported WEBP conversion.
- Performance optimization
- UI polish and refactoring

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cogwheel0/conduit/compare/v2.5.2...v2.5.3

- Temporary Chats
- More UI polish
- Fix startup crash

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cogwheel0/conduit/compare/v2.5.1...v2.5.2

apps.subtitle: Native mobile client for OpenWebUI.
apps.localizedDescription: Native mobile client for OpenWebUI. Chat with your self-hosted AI.

privacy.NSCameraUsageDescription: Conduit uses the camera to take photos or videos you choose to share in chats.
privacy.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Conduit uses the microphone to record voice messages and enable voice-to-text in chats.
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Conduit needs access to your photo library so you can select existing images or videos to share in chats.
privacy.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Conduit uses on-device speech recognition so you can dictate messages hands-free.
